subject: docs: retire closed items, capture deferred-by-design decisions
body:
Follow-ups from the pattern-compliance pass:

- docs/TODO.md: strike the "scripts/generate-theme-meta.mjs" item (shipped
  last commit). Rewrite the "add a second combo" checklist to point at
  `npm run check-theme-meta -- --write` for hex regeneration — no more
  manual oklch → hex conversion. Add two explicit-decision items so a
  future reader doesn't re-open them:
    * "Check for updates" menu item — tracked with its blocker
      (usePWAUpdate needs a manual checkForUpdates() export).
    * "Random theme on load" toggle — marked deferred by design; it's
      Approach-A-specific and we use Approach B combos.
- CLAUDE.md BURGER_MENU section: enumerate the full MenuAction field
  set (label/action/visible/disabled/separator/destructive/highlight/
  highlightColor/selected/icon/iconClass/external/keepOpen/ariaLabel)
  so the next reader doesn't have to cross-check against the pattern
  doc. Tag which are ours (selected, keepOpen, ariaLabel) vs pattern
  (all others). List the shared disclosure hooks in one place too.

Tags: docs, todo, pattern-compliance
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-compliance
Semver: patch
title: retire closed items, capture deferred-by-design decisions
